idea.hook: What's the STRONGEST magnet in the Universe?
facts: Meet the Magnetar: a dead star with a field of up to 1 Quadrillion Gauss (10^15 G)!
That's 2,000 TRILLION times stronger than Earth's.
It could erase your credit card from 100,000 miles away!
idea.payoff: A force so immense, it could rip matter apart and warp space itself!
idea.title: STRONGEST Magnet in the Cosmos! 🤯🌌

scenes.text: What's the STRONGEST magnet in the Universe?
scenes.visual: Dark, cosmic background with subtle swirling energy. A large, glowing question mark appears and dissolves.
Earth rotating slowly, with visible, subtle magnetic field lines emanating from poles.

scenes.text: Meet the Magnetar: 1 Quadrillion Gauss (10^15 G)!
scenes.visual: A stylized, intensely glowing neutron star (Magnetar) with extremely dense, glowing magnetic field lines pulsating outwards across the screen.

scenes.text: 2,000 TRILLION x stronger! Erases cards 100,000 miles away!
scenes.visual: Quick split-screen comparison: small Earth with weak field on left, large Magnetar with powerful field on right. A credit card icon near the Magnetar warps and shatters.

scenes.text: A force so immense, it could rip matter apart and warp space itself!
scenes.visual: Abstract, intense visual of highly distorted space-time, streaking energy, and particles being violently torn apart around an invisible, powerful central force.
